name: Topaz & Numby
desc:
Topaz is the Leader of the Special Debts Picket Team and high-level manager of the Strategic Investment Department under the Interastral Peace Corporation.
A member of the "Ten Stonehearts" at a young age, Topaz's foundational expertise is "debt retrieval."
Her partner, the Warp Trotter "Numby," is also capable of keenly perceiving where "riches" are located, ensuring that jobs based in security, debt collection, and actuarial varieties are of no great challenge.
At presently they are traveling the cosmos together, seeking all manner of liability disputes that might be affecting the stable progression of the IPC's businesses.

1.name: Future Market
1.desc: When enemies afflicted with "Proof of Debt" receive <u>Follow-Up ATKs</u>, they will enter the "Debtor" state. This can take effect only once within a single attack.\nThe "Debtor" state increases the CRIT DMG of <u>Follow-Up ATKs</u> inflicted on the enemy target by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, stacking up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s). When "Proof of Debt" is removed, the "Debtor" state is also removed.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

2.name: Bona Fide Acquisition
2.desc: After Numby takes action and launches an attack, Topaz regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

3.name: Seize the Big and Free the Small
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Agile Operation
4.desc: After Numby's turn begins, Topaz's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

5.name: Inflationary Demand
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Incentive Mechanism
6.desc: Numby's attack count during the "Windfall Bonanza!" state increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, and its Fire <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> when it attacks.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

111201.name: Deficit...
111201.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Topaz's ATK to one designated enemy.
111201.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to an enemy.

111202.name: Difficulty Paying?
111202.desc: Inflicts one designated enemy target with a "Proof of Debt" state, increasing the <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> DMG it receives by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. "Proof of Debt" only takes effect on the most recent target it is applied to. If there are no enemies inflicted with "Proof of Debt" on the field when an ally's turn starts or when an ally takes action, Topaz will inflict a random enemy with "Proof of Debt."\nNumby deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Topaz's ATK to this target. Using this Skill to deal DMG is considered as launching a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>.
111202.simple_desc: Inflicts one enemy with a "Proof of Debt" state and causes it to <color=#f29e38ff>receive increased Follow-Up ATK DMG</color>. Numby deals Fire DMG to the target.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

111203.name: Turn a Profit!
111203.desc: Numby enters the Windfall Bonanza! state and its DMG multiplier increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and CRIT DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Also, when enemies with Proof of Debt are hit by an ally's Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, Numby's action is Advanced Forward by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. Numby exits the Windfall Bonanza! state after using <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> attacks.
111203.simple_desc: Numby enters the Windfall Bonanza! state and <color=#f29e38ff>increases its DMG multiplier and CRIT DMG</color>.

111204.name: Trotter Market!?
111204.desc: Summons Numby at the start of battle. Numby has <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> SPD by default. When taking action, Numby launches <u>Follow-Up ATKs</u> on one enemy target afflicted with "Proof of Debt," dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Topaz's ATK.\nWhen enemies afflicted with "Proof of Debt" receive an ally's Follow-Up ATKs, Numby's action is Advanced Forward by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. The action Advance Forward effect cannot be triggered during Numby's own turn.\nWhen Topaz is <u>downed</u>, Numby disappears.
111204.simple_desc: At the start of the battle, <color=#f29e38ff>summons Numby</color>. When Numby takes action, it <color=#f29e38ff>launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> on a target afflicted with "Proof of Debt"</color>, dealing Fire DMG.\nWhen an enemy afflicted with "Proof of Debt" receives <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, Numby's <color=#f29e38ff>action advances</color>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

111206.name: Attack
111206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

111207.name: Explicit Subsidy
111207.desc:
Summons Numby when Topaz enters the overworld. Numby will automatically search for Basic Treasures and Trotters within a set radius.
Using her Technique will regenerate <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy for Topaz after Numby's first attack in the next battle.
If Topaz is still in the team after using her Technique and defeating overworld enemies, a small bonus amount of credits will be added to the earned credits. A maximum of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> bonus credits can be received per calendar day.
After using her Technique and defeating enemies in Simulated Universe or Divergent Universe, additionally receive a small amount of Cosmic Fragments with a small chance to obtain 1 random Curio.
111207.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Summons Numby to tag along</color> in a map. Numby will automatically <color=#f29e38ff>search for Basic Treasures and Trotters nearby</color>. Using Technique will regenerate Energy for Topaz after Numby's first attack in the next battle.

1.point_desc: When Topaz uses Basic ATK to deal DMG, it is considered as a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

1.point_desc: Increases Topaz & Numby's DMG dealt to enemy targets with Fire Weakness by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
After Numby uses an attack while in the Windfall Bonanza! state, Topaz additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.
